name: Multi-section directional coupler without design()
description: Tests that the agent sets couplerDirectional properties manually and uses vector Width/Spacing since there is no design() method
prompt: I need a 3-section directional coupler at 5 GHz for signal sampling. Set it up with coupled-line sections and check the coupling and directivity.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Does not attempt design(couplerDirectional,...) which does not exist
Sets Width and Spacing as vectors (one element per section) for NumSections=3

name: Wilkinson splitter with analysis functions
description: Tests the standard design workflow: design(), show(), sparameters(), and coupler analysis functions
prompt: Design a Wilkinson power splitter at 2.4 GHz on FR4. Show me the S-parameters and check the isolation between output ports.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses design() to auto-size at target frequency

name: Corporate divider with correct NumOutputPorts
description: Tests that the agent uses a power-of-2 value for NumOutputPorts on powerDividerCorporate
prompt: I need an 8-way power divider for a phased array feed network at 5.8 GHz. Design it and show the layout.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses design() at the target frequency
